subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-11 in Budapest
subcodes.first_line: My greatest hope is that the East and West may be united, for this is the greatest service that can be rendered to the world of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: من اعظم آمالم ارتباط بین شرق و غرب است چه این اعظم خدمت بعالم انسانی است
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity; oneness of humanity
